  <style>
    :root {
      --cream: #f0efe0;
      --sage: #a4cea6;
      --sage-light: #c8e6c9;
      --navy: #04324b;
      --navy-dark: #032a3d;
      --blue-light: #bfdfea;
      --blue-muted: #d5eaf2;
      --text-dark: #04324b;
      --text-light: #f0efe0;
      --font-display: 'Luckiest Guy', cursive;
      --font-body: 'Nunito Sans', sans-serif;
    }
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      background: var(--cream);
      color: var(--text-dark);
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    body::before {
      content: '';
      position: fixed; inset: 0;
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='80' height='80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence baseFrequency='0.55' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.018'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999;
    }

    /* NAV */
    nav {
      position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
      background: var(--cream); border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy);
      transition: box-shadow 0.3s;
    }
    nav.scrolled { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(4,50,75,0.08); }
    .nav-inner {
      max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 10px 32px;
    }
    .nav-logo { height: 56px; width: auto; transition: transform 0.3s; }
    .nav-logo:hover { transform: rotate(-5deg) scale(1.05); }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 36px; list-style: none; }
    .nav-links a {
      text-decoration: none; color: var(--navy);
      font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase;
      position: relative; transition: color 0.3s;
    }
    .nav-links a::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0;
      width: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--sage); transition: width 0.3s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--sage); }
    .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }
    .hamburger {
      display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px;
      cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; padding: 4px;
    }
    .hamburger span { width: 26px; height: 2px; background: var(--navy); border-radius: 2px; }

    /* HERO */
    .hero {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      text-align: center; position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-plaid {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding: 120px 24px 60px;
      position: relative;
      background-image: url("data:image/png;base64,");
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center;
    }
    .hero-logo-wrap {
      position: relative;
      animation: float 4s ease-in-out infinite;
      z-index: 2;
    }
    @keyframes float {
      0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
      50% { transform: translateY(-12px); }
    }
    .hero-logo {
      width: 305px; height: 305px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      object-fit: cover;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 32px rgba(4,50,75,0.15));
    }
    .hero-text-band {
      background: var(--cream);
      padding: 48px 24px 56px;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
      position: relative;
    }
    .hero-text-band::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: -19px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 20px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, var(--cream) 14px, transparent 15px) repeat-x;
      background-size: 30px 20px;
    }
    .hero-tagline {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 3rem);
      color: var(--navy);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.3s forwards;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
    .hero-sub {
      font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--sage);
      letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 32px;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.6s forwards;
    }
    @keyframes fadeUp {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .hero-cta {
      display: inline-block; background: var(--navy);
      color: var(--text-light); text-decoration: none;
      padding: 16px 48px; border-radius: 50px;
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem;
      letter-spacing: 1px; transition: all 0.3s;
      opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s 0.9s forwards;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(4,50,75,0.2);
    }
    .hero-cta:hover {
      background: var(--sage); color: var(--navy);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(164,206,166,0.3);
    }

    /* MARQUEE */
    .marquee-wrap { overflow: hidden; background: var(--navy); padding: 14px 0; }
    .marquee {
      display: flex; gap: 60px;
      animation: scroll 20s linear infinite; width: max-content;
    }
    @keyframes scroll {
      0% { transform: translateX(0); }
      100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
    }
    .marquee span {
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.2rem;
      color: var(--cream); white-space: nowrap; opacity: 0.9;
    }
    .marquee .dot { color: var(--sage); }

    /* SECTIONS */
    section { scroll-margin-top: 84px; }
    .section-title {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
      color: var(--navy); text-align: center; margin-bottom: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
    .section-subtitle {
      text-align: center; color: var(--sage); font-size: 1rem;
      letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
      font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 60px;
    }

    /* SHOP */
    .shop-section { padding: 100px 24px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .product-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
      gap: 40px;
    }
    .product-card {
      background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(4,50,75,0.06);
      transition: all 0.4s; cursor: pointer; position: relative;
    }
    .product-card:hover {
      transform: translateY(-6px);
      box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(4,50,75,0.12);
    }
    .product-card .badge {
      position: absolute; top: 16px; left: 16px;
      background: var(--navy); color: var(--cream);
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.85rem;
      padding: 4px 14px; border-radius: 20px; z-index: 2;
    }
    .product-img-wrap {
      position: relative; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 1;
      background-color: #e8ece8;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(45deg, #d8ddd8 25%, transparent 25%),
        linear-gradient(-45deg, #d8ddd8 25%, transparent 25%),
        linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, #d8ddd8 75%),
        linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, #d8ddd8 75%);
      background-size: 20px 20px;
      background-position: 0 0, 0 10px, 10px -10px, -10px 0;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    }
    .product-emoji {
      font-size: 5rem;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1));
      transition: transform 0.4s;
    }
    .product-card:hover .product-emoji { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(-3deg); }
    .product-info { padding: 24px; text-align: center; }
    .product-name { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .product-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--sage); margin-bottom: 12px; font-weight: 600; }
    .product-price { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.2rem; color: var(--text-dark); }
    .product-btn {
      display: inline-block; margin-top: 16px; padding: 10px 32px;
      background: var(--navy); color: var(--cream);
      border: none; border-radius: 50px;
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem;
      cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;
    }
    .product-btn:hover { background: var(--sage); color: var(--navy); }

    /* ABOUT */
    .about-section {
      padding: 100px 24px; background: var(--navy);
      color: var(--cream); position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .about-section::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.04;
      background-image:
        repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 38px, var(--cream) 38px, var(--cream) 40px),
        repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 38px, var(--cream) 38px, var(--cream) 40px);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .about-inner {
      max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; position: relative;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    }
    .about-section .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
    .about-section .section-subtitle { color: var(--sage); }
    .about-text {
      font-size: 1.2rem; line-height: 2; text-align: center;
      max-width: 680px; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
    }
    .about-values {
      display: flex; gap: 48px; margin-top: 64px;
      flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;
    }
    .about-value { text-align: center; flex: 1; min-width: 180px; }
    .about-value-icon {
      width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 1.8rem; margin: 0 auto 16px;
    }
    .about-value:nth-child(1) .about-value-icon { background: var(--sage); }
    .about-value:nth-child(2) .about-value-icon { background: var(--blue-light); }
    .about-value:nth-child(3) .about-value-icon { background: var(--sage-light); }
    .about-value-title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem; margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .about-value-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; opacity: 0.8; font-weight: 300; }

    /* TAGLINE BANNER */
    .tagline-banner { padding: 80px 24px; text-align: center; }
    .ribbon-divider {
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      padding: 24px 0; gap: 20px;
    }
    .ribbon-divider .line { height: 2px; width: 80px; background: var(--sage); }
    .ribbon-divider .star { font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--sage); }
    .taglines { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; align-items: center; }
    .tagline-item { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2rem); }
    .tagline-item:nth-child(1) { color: var(--sage); }
    .tagline-item:nth-child(2) { color: var(--navy); }
    .tagline-item:nth-child(3) { color: var(--blue-light); }

    /* CONTACT */
    .contact-section { padding: 100px 24px; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .contact-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; }
    .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
    .form-group label { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--navy); }
    .form-group input, .form-group textarea {
      padding: 14px 20px; border: 2px solid #dde4dd; border-radius: 12px;
      font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 1rem;
      background: #fff; color: var(--text-dark); transition: border-color 0.3s; resize: vertical;
    }
    .form-group input:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--sage); }
    .form-group textarea { min-height: 140px; }
    .submit-btn {
      align-self: center; background: var(--navy); color: var(--cream);
      border: none; padding: 16px 56px; border-radius: 50px;
      font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.2rem;
      cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(4,50,75,0.2);
    }
    .submit-btn:hover {
      background: var(--sage); color: var(--navy);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
      box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(164,206,166,0.3);
    }

    /* FOOTER */
    footer { background: var(--navy-dark); color: var(--cream); padding: 60px 24px 32px; }
    .footer-inner {
      max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: flex-start; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 40px;
    }
    .footer-brand { max-width: 300px; }
    .footer-logo { height: 80px; width: auto; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .footer-tagline { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--sage); }
    .footer-col h4 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.2rem; margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--sage); }
    .footer-col a {
      display: block; color: var(--cream); text-decoration: none;
      font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 8px;
      opacity: 0.8; transition: opacity 0.3s;
    }
    .footer-col a:hover { opacity: 1; }
    .footer-bottom {
      text-align: center; margin-top: 48px; padding-top: 24px;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(240,239,224,0.1);
      font-size: 0.8rem; opacity: 0.5;
    }

    /* SCALLOPS */
    .scallop-top {
      width: 100%; height: 30px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0, var(--cream) 14px, transparent 15px) repeat-x;
      background-size: 30px 30px; margin-top: -15px; position: relative; z-index: 2;
    }
    .scallop-bottom-navy {
      width: 100%; height: 30px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, var(--navy) 14px, transparent 15px) repeat-x;
      background-size: 30px 30px; margin-bottom: -15px; position: relative; z-index: 2;
    }

    .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease; }
    .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .nav-links { display: none; }
      .nav-links.open {
        display: flex; flex-direction: column;
        position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0;
        background: var(--cream); padding: 24px 32px;
        border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy); gap: 20px;
      }
      .hamburger { display: flex; }
      .hero-logo { width: 240px; height: 240px; }
      .hero-plaid { padding: 100px 24px 48px; }
      .hero-text-band { padding: 36px 24px 44px; }
      .product-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; max-width: 400px; margin: 0 auto; }
      .about-values { gap: 32px; }
      .footer-inner { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; }
    }
  </style>
